content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

March 29, 1983

TO: File
FROM: Janis Shank McLean JSM
RE: T-83-079

A proponent of having card rooms in San Diego paid for the special election at which the public will vote on whether to have card rooms. The $18,000 paid constitutes an expenditure or contribution and the proponent is a major donor committee.
